What We Make

Our Products

Every product poured, cured and quality-checked at our Embu-Siakago yard before it reaches your site.

⭐ Best Seller
Fencing Poles
2.1m length · 4 full-length rebars · 14-day curing. The pole that doesn't crack — delivered directly to your site anywhere in Embu County.
Minimum order: 65 poles
High Demand
Pavers / Cabros
600×300mm high-density pavers. Perfect for driveways, compounds, pathways, forecourts and public spaces. Durable and professionally finished.
Minimum order: 200 pieces
High Value
Culverts & Drainage
600mm diameter rings for roads, farm crossings, and drainage systems. Suitable for county projects, NG-CDF works and private road construction.
Minimum order: 5 rings
From November 2026
Ballast
Crushed stone sourced and processed directly in Siakago. No middleman. No markup. The freshest, most affordable ballast in Embu County — delivered to your site.
Minimum order: 5 tonnes
Why Imara

The Imara Difference

Not every precast supplier is built the same. Here is what sets Imara apart.

⚖️
Measured Mix — Every Pour
Our 1:2:3 cement-sand-ballast ratio is measured every single time. The difference between 20 years and 6 months starts with the mix.
🔩
4 Rebars — Full Length
Every fencing pole has 4 steel rebar wires running the full 2.1 metre length. Not 2. Not short wires. 4, full length, every time.
📅
14-Day Curing Minimum
No pole leaves our yard before 14 days of proper curing. We never rush to clear stock. Quality before speed — always.
📍
Siakago Location Advantage
Our yard sits in Siakago with direct access to river sand and ballast. Lower production costs mean better prices for you.
💰
Price Quoted = Price Paid
The price we give you is the price you pay on delivery. No adjustments. No surprises. No excuses. That is how trust is built.
🚛
Delivered to Your Site
We deliver across Embu County. Order confirmed, production starts, and your products arrive on the agreed date.
How It Works

From Order to Site

Simple. Transparent. On time. Every order follows the same four steps.

1
WhatsApp or Quote
Send us a message or fill the quote form. We confirm your order and price within the hour.
2
M-Pesa Payment
Pay via M-Pesa before or on delivery. We send your delivery date immediately after payment confirmation.
3
Production & Curing
Your order is produced at Embu-Siakago. Minimum 14 days curing — no shortcuts, ever.
4
Delivered to Site
We deliver on the agreed date. Unloaded at your site, quality-checked and ready to install.
